name: revit_create_room_cropped_plan_views
description: Duplicates each level's associated plan view per room and sets a crop region offset to the room boundary by wall thickness.

level_ids.description: Optional subset of level element ids to process

room_ids.description: Optional subset of room element ids to process

wall_offset_factor.description: Multiplier applied to wall width when computing outward offset (default uses wall width plus 0.1 ft padding)

view_name_suffix.description: Optional suffix appended to generated view names instead of the default date stamp

notes: Optional filters and naming parameters are not yet implemented in the command. Re-running may fail when duplicate view names already exist.
